---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #130...<br>[{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}]{.bigger} [Shortcodes!!]{.syncopate}<br>`{{< yadda yadda >}}`'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/mugsy.png
#  data-background-opacity: ".8"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/e4638f60-ecd7-4228-b667-e7628252709e/dhq1lm1-a29e1617-2f53-4409-9dd8-39f0a86a6c30.png/v1/fit/w_828,h_1072/looney_tunes_cartoons____36__rocky_by_disneycrossover143_dhq1lm1-414w-2x.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uD3Pu7EgEY3-Av8BLHhSnD5wfr80lua0k8AXqEQlvxo   #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
+ Recap session #129
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}]{.bigger} [Shortcodes!!]{.syncopate}<br>`{{< yadda yadda >}}`](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/shortcodes.html)
+ Shared problem-solving

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 170px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/5_12_26">
  <img src="/img/title129.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#129: 

![](https://pngimg.com/uploads/sticky_note/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="100"}

![](https://thebasie.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/accessibility.png){.absolute top="285" right="115" height="200"}

## [[Presentation Accessibility Enhancements!!]{.nostress}[{{< iconify la:accessible-icon >}}]{.bigger}](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### built--in {{< iconify simple-icons:revealdotjs style="color:#e157e6;" >}}{{< iconify vscode-icons:file-type-js-official >}}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="19%"}

:::

+ [`axe-core`](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-accessibility.html) testing
+ [alt text](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/figures.html#alt-text) (images)
+ [slide--tone](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/presenting.html#slide-tone)
+ [web--standards](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Learn_web_development/Getting_started/Web_standards/The_web_standards_model) built

:::

![](../../../img/axecore.png){.absolute right="-30" bottom="0" height="350"}

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0f/Accessibility.svg/1280px-Accessibility.svg.png){.absolute left="-130" bottom="40" height="300"}

### `a11y` extension 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="18%"}

+ [Description](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y#revealjs-a11y)
+ [Options](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y#options)
+ [Shortcuts](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y#options)
+ [Installation](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y#installation)

::: 

::: {.column width="18%"}

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

<iframe
src="https://m.canouil.dev/quarto-revealjs-a11y/#/title-slide"
width="600"
height="350"
style="border:none;">
</iframe>

:::

:::

:::

![](https://revealjs.com/images/logo/reveal-black-text-sticker.png){.absolute right="-110" top="135" height="100"}

# Today...

![](https://media1.tenor.com/m/p5RICZgdNGMAAAAC/fi-fidonia-cachetada.gif)

## [[{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}}]{.bigger} [Shortcodes!!]{.syncopate}](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/shortcodes.html)

<br>

+ Structure is `{{< name arg1 arg2 key=value >}}`  
+ entire `{{{< ... >}}}` is referred to as a "[shortcode](https://github.com/quarto-dev/quarto-shortcodes)"

::: {.smaller}
::: {.list-table tbl-colwidths="[40,35,25]"}

- - [shortcode]{.underline}:
  - [description]{.underline}:
  - [rendered]{.underline}:

- - `{{{< meta title >}}}`
  - title as specified in YAML
  
  - {{< meta title >}} 
  
- - `{{{< version >}}}`
  - Quarto version
  
  - {{< version >}} 

:::
:::

![](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/pv-target-images/b6a9dde0a56008f4cb9ef604fbc2ef3ba06614685b05a4f24d8e97dc1edfc7cf._BR-6_AC_SX720_FMjpg_.jpg){.absolute right="-10" top="-40" height="250"}

![](https://comicvine.gamespot.com/a/uploads/original/1/15776/8674793-rocky.png){.absolute left="-150" top="140" height="200" .mirror}

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} & {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
sessionInfo()
```
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`  

:::

:::
